headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Dominion Energy (D) After Its Recent 19.6% Share Price Gain?
summary: If you are wondering whether Dominion Energy is still reasonably priced after a strong run, this breakdown will help you understand what you are really paying for each share. The stock trades at US$60.95, with returns of 2.9% year to date and 19.6% over the past year, so the recent performance is front of mind for many investors who are weighing potential upside and risk. Recent coverage has focused on Dominion Energy's role in the US utilities sector and how its regulated operations fit...

headline: NextEra Energy Beats Q1 Earnings Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
summary: NEE tops first-quarter earnings estimates as FPL and Energy Resources lift results, but revenues miss; renewables and storage origination add 4 GW.
